text.title: Web Scraping Element Extraction Procedure
text.summary: Five-step procedure from "we want field X" to "row JSON written to raw/". Decision-gates block on misapplied API or skipped normalization.

step.name: pick-shape
step.action: Classify: single | many | table. Pick API: Playwright → `locator()`. Puppeteer → $eval for single, $$eval for many.
step.decision-gate: $eval against a multi-element selector → STOP, switch to $$eval/locator().

step.name: extract
step.action: Read textContent / attribute / table cells. Wrap in try/except — never throw to the row loop.
step.decision-gate: If extraction returns undefined when element matches but property absent (e.g. img without src) — STOP, add a null guard.

step.name: normalize
step.input: raw value, field kind (text / price / date).
step.action: Apply: text → trim + collapse-ws + strip-nonprintable. Price → locale-aware parse to float. Date → ISO 8601. Append used normalizers to normalizers_applied[].
step.decision-gate: If field kind unspecified — STOP, the schema must declare each field's kind.

step.name: null-coerce
step.input: normalized value (may be NaN / "" / Invalid Date).
step.action: If invalid: set field=null, append {field, reason} to parse_failures[]. Do not throw.
step.output: row JSON with normalised fields + parse_failures.
step.decision-gate: If row has more than half its fields null AND no parse_failures — extractor is silently mis-normalizing; STOP and inspect.

step.name: persist
step.action: Validate against schema. Valid → main JSONL. Invalid → invalid/<source>.jsonl with validation error.
step.decision-gate: Validation must run; never persist unvalidated rows.
